expected_outcome: Competent automation engineer skilled in writing end-to-end web tests, configuring test runners, generating HTML reports, and testing APIs using Playwright.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily scripting page navigations, asserting titles, and locating inputs.

mini_project.title: Static Page Automation Suite
mini_project.description: Write a test script that navigates to a documentation portal, searches for items, selects pages, and asserts text headings match.

phases.milestone: Mastered Playwright workspace initialization, locator selections, and page loading assertions.

topics.name: User Actions
subtopics: Handling checkboxes, dropdowns, and radio selectors

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily refactoring tests to POM classes and scripting forms entries.

mini_project.title: Dynamic Feedback Test Suite
mini_project.description: Automate testing an online survey page: fill text fields, select options, submit, and verify validation errors using POM.

phases.milestone: Proficient in simulating user action sequences, organizing code with POM, and verifying validation messages.

topics.name: API Testing with Playwright
subtopics: Interacting with endpoints using request client
Asserting status codes and JSON properties

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily intercepting network traffic and testing REST endpoint integrations.

mini_project.title: CRUD REST API & Integration Test
mini_project.description: Write tests that trigger a backend API to add a product, mock visual lists updates in frontend, and assert updates represent.

phases.milestone: Capable of managing complex dialog states, automating iframe elements, and validating API structures.

topics.name: Test Reports & Traces
subtopics: Taking screenshots and video recordings on failure

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily configuring YAML pipelines, inspecting failure traces, and formatting reports.

mini_project.title: Continuous Test Pipeline
mini_project.description: Establish a GitHub Action configuration that triggers tests on commit pushes, runs them in headless Chromium, and packages failures.

phases.milestone: Equipped to review failure traces, configure HTML dashboards, and deploy tests to automated CI pipelines.

major_projects.title: E-Commerce E2E Automation Framework
major_projects.description: Create a testing repository covering: user sign-in checks, catalog navigation, shopping cart updates, mock payment validations, parallel execution, POM patterns, and daily pipeline reports.
